examples.text: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَاسْتَغْفِرْهُ إِنَّهُ كَانَ تَوَّابًا
examples.english: then glorify the praises of your Lord and seek His forgiveness, for certainly He is ever Accepting of Repentance.

senses.gloss: oft-returning, those who turn in repentance

examples.text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ التَّوَّابِينَ وَيُحِبُّ الْمُتَطَهِّرِينَ
examples.english: Surely Allah loves those who always turn to Him in repentance and those who purify themselves.

etymology.text: Characteristic adjective from the root ت و ب (t w b).
